name: Bento grid

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need to combine heterogeneous metrics, highlights, and explanations from one theme into a strong visual summary, such as a project delivery, quarterly review, product overview, or portfolio. If every record has the same structure, use a regular card grid; if you need precise comparison of the same metric, use a table or chart.
en.why_valuable: A Bento layout establishes hierarchy, but hand-written grids easily develop gaps, out-of-range spans, and broken narrow-screen layouts; this template provides a reusable six-column CSS Grid with dense packing and constrained row and column spans, then safely degrades to two columns and one column.

data_in.note: data.tiles are placed in order into a dense six-column CSS Grid. cols is clamped to 1-6 and rows to 1-3, defaulting to 2x1; below 720px the grid becomes two columns with spans limited to 2, and below 440px every tile becomes one column by one row. accent changes only theme emphasis, not layout.

schema.title?: string -- Bento title; displays "Highlights" when omitted
schema.subtitle?: string -- scope description in the title area
schema.tiles: {eyebrow?:string,title:string,value?:string|number,description?:string,icon?:string,cols?:number,rows?:number,accent?:boolean}[] -- content tiles and CSS Grid spans

spec.note: The six-column grid uses a minimum 116px automatic row height and grows with tiles; it becomes two columns on medium screens and one column on small screens, with no JavaScript measurement, vh, or percentage heights.

when_to_use: 需要把一组异质但同属一个主题的指标、亮点和说明组合成强视觉摘要时用它，适合项目交付、季度回顾、产品概览和作品集。若每条记录结构完全相同，用普通卡片网格；若需要精确比较同一指标，用表格或图表。
why_valuable: Bento 布局能建立主次，但手写网格容易出现空洞、跨度越界和窄屏破版；本模板用固定六列 CSS Grid、dense 填充与受限行列跨度构成可复用版式，再在两列和单列断点安全降级。

data_in.note: data.tiles 按顺序放入六列 dense CSS Grid。cols 夹到 1–6，rows 夹到 1–3，缺省为 2×1；720px 以下折为两列并把跨度限制到 2，440px 以下全部单列单行。accent 只改变主题强调，不影响布局。

schema.title?: string —— Bento 标题；省略时显示 “Highlights”
schema.subtitle?: string —— 标题区的范围说明
schema.tiles: {eyebrow?:string,title:string,value?:string|number,description?:string,icon?:string,cols?:number,rows?:number,accent?:boolean}[] —— 内容瓦片与 CSS Grid 跨度

spec.note: 六列网格使用最小 116px 自动行高并随 tiles 增高；中屏两列、小屏单列，无 JavaScript 测量、vh 或百分比高度。

example._why: 一组真实的季度产品成果包含主 KPI、可靠性、交付速度、研究洞察和发布摘要，多种 1–4 列与 1–2 行跨度能验证 dense 布局及响应式降级。

tiles.title: Weekly active teams
tiles.description: Up 18% quarter over quarter after the shared inbox launch.

tiles.title: Research conversations
tiles.description: Across seven industries and four regions.

tiles.title: Five meaningful releases
tiles.description: Offline mode, team analytics, shared inbox, audit exports, and a faster search experience.

tiles.title: Next: onboarding clarity
tiles.description: Reduce time-to-first-value for new workspace owners.

uplink: none: 纯展示组件；所有悬停、滚动、原生链接或其他局部交互都只发生在自有 shadow 内，不向 AI 或宿主回传数据。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一零依赖模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero global footprint; rendered-verified
